channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 3 com severidade Crítica
• 7 com severidade Alta
• 4 novas CVEs
• 1 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-56265 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Crawl4AI before 0.8.7 contains an authentication bypass vulnerability due to a hardcoded default JWT signing key in the Docker API server. Attackers who know the default key can forge valid authentication tokens for any user, bypassing authentication and gaining full access to protected functionality.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-56265
 
📰 F5 publica patches para falhas com CVSS 9.2 no NGINX - CISO Advisor
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: 9.2
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Nginx, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijAFBVV95cUxNazJNeURhb1djaWxNRkZYSmFhSE9KYzQ0X3ZlSm0zMnprXzZiQjRpbFVGa1d3dVFuRDVhNmVURUItUEFqV1YwODNKa29TZmVobEhkMFNQdThiSUh4MUZjdTB2bWRDN1l0Q25pOV8weHBMVTRQcUpyUWxFWF9nSTZsU3FHZndDLUlQTzFIaQ?oc=5
 
📰 VCF Breakroom Chats Episode 90 – Shift Into High Gear: Supercharge Your Private Cloud with VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service in VCF 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Welcome to the next episode of the VCF Breakroom Chats. Today, we are happy to present this vLog with Natalie Fisher, Principal Product Marketing Manager. In this episode, Natalie Fisher and Jay Thontakudi break down the strategic advantages of the new VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service (VKS) capabilities introduced in VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/22/vcf-breakroom-chats-episode-90-shift-into-high-gear-supercharge-your-private-cloud-with-vmware-vsphere-kubernetes-service-in-vcf-9-1/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

📰 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Browser Bugs, EDR Killers, TV Botnet, OpenBSD Flaw, Android Trojan, and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
This week’s threat list looks painfully familiar: abused integrations, fake tools, poisoned websites, ransomware crews trying to shut down security tools, and mobile malware asking for way too much control. The annoying part is how little of this feels new. Weak credentials, sketchy downloads, browser extensions with too much access, and WordPress sites are used to push more
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/weekly-recap-browser-bugs-edr-killers.html
 
📰 AryStinger Malware Infects 4,300 Legacy Routers to Build Reconnaissance Proxy Network
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new malware family is turning forgotten home routers into a distributed reconnaissance and proxy network, not the DDoS botnet these devices usually end up in. QiAnXin's XLab calls it AryStinger and counts at least 4,300 infected routers, a total it says is still rising. AryStinger exists for the stage of an attack that comes before the break-in.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/arystinger-malware-infects-4300-legacy.html
 
📰 New OXLOADER Loader Uses Malicious Google Ads to Deliver CastleStealer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a new campaign that delivers CastleStealer by means of a previously unreported malware loader dubbed OXLOADER. According to Elastic Security Labs, the campaign leverages malicious Google Ads as a starting point to distribute the malware. Evidence indicates that the threat actor is likely Russian-speaking and financially motivated, owing to the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/new-oxloader-loader-uses-malicious.html
 
📰 A Glimpse into the “Search Your Target” Market for Stolen Credentials
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers no longer need to sift through massive credential dumps. Flare explores how an emerging underground market searches stolen credential databases for specific companies, domains, and accounts.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/a-glimpse-into-the-search-your-target-market-for-stolen-credentials/
 
📰 AryStinger botnet infected thousands of D-Link routers worldwide
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A previously undocumented malware botnet named AryStinger has compromised more than 4,000 outdated routers to turn them into proxies for malicious traffic.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/arystinger-botnet-infected-thousands-of-d-link-routers-worldwide/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-54100 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.3
Resumo:
A flaw was found in the Windows Machine Config Operator (WMCO) for Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform. WMCO establishes SSH connections to Windows worker nodes without verifying the remote server host key. An adjacent-network attacker who can intercept or redirect WMCO's SSH session can capture WICD and kubelet bootstrap credentials transferred during node configuration, enabling compromise of Windows node identiti...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54100
 
🚨 CVE-2026-56425 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Azure Active Directory (AAD) authentication implementation contained multiple weaknesses in its OAuth 2.0 authorization flow that could allow attackers to bypass important security guarantees provided by the protocol. The application used the PHP session identifier (session_id()) as the OAuth state parameter. Because session identifiers are long-lived authentication credentials, exposing them in OAuth redirect UR...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-56425
 
🚨 CVE-2026-10530 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Pie Register WordPress plugin before 3.8.4.10 does not use sufficiently random values when generating its account verification tokens, allowing unauthenticated attackers to predict a valid token and activate an account without access to the associated email inbox.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10530
 
💣 Attackers Exploit Gravity SMTP Plugin Flaw to Harvest Valuable WordPress Data - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Ubuntu Summit 26.04: connected by open source
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/blog/feed
CVSS: 6.0
Resumo:
Ubuntu Summit 26.04 has officially drawn to a close, but the energy from our global community is still buzzing – in the comments section, on social media, and in news reports. Whether you joined us in person or tuned in from across the globe, you helped make this edition our most […]
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/ubuntu-summit-26-04-connected-by-open-source
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 21/06/2026 e 22/06/2026.
